#### 5.4.7.1.3 Time Offset Estimation for Loki

**5.4.7.1.3.0-1**  (ID: `11403715`)

Time Offset Estimation for Loki
For Loki:

5G-L1-UL estimates a short term (ST) timing offset (TO) on PUSCH and reports it to 5G-L2-PS within the UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message, which could use it to update the TA measurement. Only one value shall be provided to 5G-L2-PS for both TO parameters shortTermTaMetric and shortTermTaPeakAmp sent in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message. The reported shortTermTaMetric  value shall be in unit of (1/2μ) \* Ts, as described in 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_199 5G\_L1\_IF\_200\_replaced([11513831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note that a successful measurement requires proper setting of timing advance at the UE which has to be configured manually in early subfeatures where random access procedure is still missing (before subfeature 5GC000212-H).

The search window length for time offset estimation is changed for PUSCH and the shortTermTaMetric shall be adjusted with the new search window range (see 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_967 5G\_L1\_7335\_replaced([11402144](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e9IlqvvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

The timing offset estimation algorithm on PUSCH is described in section 2.3.4.1 of the 5GMax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_916 5G\_L1\_7703\_replaced([11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

For Loki [RP003187-F, RP003187-M] and Thor [End RP003187-F, RP003187-M]. Additionally, 5GNB 5G-L1-UL estimates and reports PUSCH per rx antenna stream shortTermTaMetricOfAnt and shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt, and sends them in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message.

Note: although antenna-wise PUSCH TO is introduced for FR1 TDD Rx beamforming cells with eCPRI RU, L1's behavior is the same among:

- CPRI or eCPRI FR1 TDD 2RX beamforming

- CPRI or eCPRI FR1 TDD 2RX non beamforming

- CPRI FR1 TDD 4Rx non beamforming

- CPRI FR1 FDD 2RX non beamforming

- CPRI FR1 FDD 4Rx non beamforming

-     For Loki L1 HW, eCPRI FR1 FDD 4Rx non beamforming

-     For Loki L1 HW, eCPRI FR1 FDD 2Rx non beamforming

- FR2 TDD 2Rx

For eCPRI case, the order eAxC spatial stream values of the antennas-wise PUSCH TO (shortTermTaMetricOfAnt) in the array and their mapping to beam patternId shall follow the same mapping order of EcpriConfig struct in 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_263 5G\_L1\_IF\_266\_replaced([11514653](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR4dkfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The same rational applies for all antenna-wise values in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6333 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1739\_replaced([11109505](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ko4tufvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For CPRI case, table below is used for the order of AxC spatial stream values. The same rationale applies for all antenna-wise values in 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_201 5G\_L1\_IF\_202\_replaced([11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Mapping between antenna-wise TO and spatial stream for CPRI

|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Subcell Type (IE ulSubcellType, see 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_151 5G\_L1\_IF\_152\_replaced([11513449](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRwhwfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) | TO for antenna i (see 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_201 5G\_L1\_IF\_202\_replaced([11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) | CPRI spatial stream |
| A2 or C2 | shortTermTaMetricOfAnt [0] | AxC0 |
| shortTermTaMetricOfAnt [1] | AxC1 |  |
| A4 or C4 | shortTermTaMetricOfAnt [0] | AxC0 |
| shortTermTaMetricOfAnt [1] | AxC1 |  |
| shortTermTaMetricOfAnt [2] | AxC2 |  |
| shortTermTaMetricOfAnt [3] | AxC3 |  |

[Before-CNI-122313-A]

This requirement is also appliable for RINLINE 1 for FR1-TDD-eCPRI.

[CNI-122313-A]

RINLINE1 HW is supported until 24R1 inclusive. RINLINE1 HW is not supported since 24R2.

[End CNI-122313-A]

---

#### 5.4.7.1.4 Time Offset Estimation for Thor and SU MIMO Receiver

**5.4.7.1.4.0-2**  (ID: `12687101`)

Time Offset Estimation for Thor and SU MIMO Receiver
For Thor and SU MIMO Receiver:

5G-L1-UL estimates a short term (ST) timing offset (TO) on PUSCH and reports it to 5G-L2-PS within the *UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message, which could use it to update the TA measurement. Only one value shall be provided to 5G-L2-PS for both TO parameters* shortTermTaMetric and *shortTermTaPeakAmp sent in* UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message. The reported *shortTermTaMetric  value shall be in unit of (1/2μ) \* Ts, as described in 5G\_L1\_IF\_200\_replaced([11513831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).*\*\*\*\*

Note that a successful measurement requires proper setting of timing advance at the UE which has to be configured manually in early subfeatures where random access procedure is still missing (before subfeature 5GC000212-H).

The search window length for time offset estimation is changed for PUSCH and the *shortTermTaMetric shall be adjusted with the new search window range (see 5G\_L1\_7335\_replaced([11402144](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e9IlqvvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).*

The timing offset estimation algorithm on PUSCH is described in section 2.3.4.1 of the 5GMax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_L1\_7703\_replaced([11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

For Thor. Additionally, 5GNB 5G-L1-UL estimates and reports PUSCH per rx antenna stream *shortTermTaMetricOfAnt and* shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt, and sends them in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs *message.*\*\*

[CB008465-AA]

For NR FDD non-beamforming deployments, when UL CoMP is enabled, for each UE scheduled on PUSCH and configured as joint reception, 5G-L1-UL shall perform antenna-wise ST TO on the Helper subcell in addition to the Serving subcell. For UL CoMP, the number of measurements would be twice the number of antennas for a single cell (8 in case of A4 subcell) and then shall be reported to 5G-L2-PS using UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs.PuschAntMeas.(*shortTermTaMetricOfAnt/shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt) with Serving subcell measurements always placed first and that Helper subcell measurements follow contiguously.*

The mapping between ST TO and CPRI AxC spatial streams of Serving and Helper subcells is as follows

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Subcell Type | Subcell | ST TO for antenna i | CPRI spatial stream | **First feature** |
| A4 | Serving | **puschAntMeas[0].*shortTermTaMetricOfAnt \**puschAntMeas[0].*shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt***\*\*\* | AxC0 | CB008465-AA |
| **puschAntMeas[1].*shortTermTaMetricOfAnt \**puschAntMeas[1].*shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt***\*\*\* | AxC1 |  |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[2].*shortTermTaMetricOfAnt \**puschAntMeas[2].*shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt***\*\*\* | AxC2 |  |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[3].*shortTermTaMetricOfAnt \**puschAntMeas[3].*shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt***\*\*\* | AxC3 |  |  |  |
| Helper | **puschAntMeas[4].*shortTermTaMetricOfAnt \**puschAntMeas[4].*shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt***\*\*\* | AxC0 |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[5].*shortTermTaMetricOfAnt \**puschAntMeas[5].*shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt***\*\*\* | AxC1 |  |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[6].*shortTermTaMetricOfAnt \**puschAntMeas[6].*shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt***\*\*\* | AxC2 |  |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[7].*shortTermTaMetricOfAnt \**puschAntMeas[7].*shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt***\*\*\* | AxC3 |  |  |  |

[End CB008465-AA]

Note: although antenna-wise PUSCH TO is introduced for FR1 TDD Rx beamforming cells with eCPRI RU, L1's behavior is the same among:

- CPRI or eCPRI FR1 TDD 2RX beamforming

- CPRI or eCPRI FR1 TDD 2RX non beamforming

- CPRI FR1 TDD 4Rx non beamforming

- CPRI FR1 FDD 2RX non beamforming

- CPRI **FR1 FDD 4Rx non beamforming**

-     For Thor L1 HW, eCPRI **FR1 TDD 8Rx non beamforming**

-     [CB013442-D] For Thor L1 HW, eCPRI FR1 FDD 8Rx beamforming/non-beamforming. [End CB013442-D]

For eCPRI case, the order eAxC spatial stream values of the antennas-wise PUSCH TO (shortTermTaMetricOfAnt) in the dynamic array structure **PuschAntMeas of** *UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message* *and their mapping to beam* patternId shall follow the same mapping order of *EcpriConfig struct in 5G\_L1\_IF\_266\_replaced([11514653](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR4dkfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The same rational applies for all antenna-wise values in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1739\_replaced([11109505](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ko4tufvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).****\****\*

For CPRI case, table below is used for the order of AxC spatial stream values. The same rationale applies for all antenna-wise values in 5G\_L1\_IF\_202\_replaced([11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

**Mapping between antenna-wise TO and spatial stream for (e)CPRI:**

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Subcell Type (IE ulSubcellType, see 5G\_L1\_IF\_152\_replaced([11513449](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRwhwfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) | TO for antenna j (see 5G\_L1\_IF\_202\_replaced([11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) | CPRI spatial stream | The First Feature |
| A2 or C2 | **PuschAntMeas[0].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt** | (ec)AxC0 |  |
| **PuschAntMeas[1].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt** | (ec)AxC1 |  |  |
| A4 or C4 | **PuschAntMeas[0].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt** | (ec)AxC0 |  |
| **PuschAntMeas[1].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt** | (ec)AxC1 |  |  |
| **PuschAntMeas[2].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt** | (ec)AxC2 |  |  |
| **PuschAntMeas[3].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt** | (ec)AxC3 |  |  |
| C8 [CB013442-D] A8 [End CB013442-D] | **PuschAntMeas[0].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt** | ecAxC0 | **CB009363-D** |
| **PuschAntMeas[1].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt** | ecAxC1 |  |  |
| … | … |  |  |
| **PuschAntMeas[j].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt** | ecAxCj |  |  |
| … | … |  |  |
| **PuschAntMeas[7].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt** | ecAxC7 |  |  |

The structure **PuschAntMeas in** UlData*\_**PuschReceiveRespPsmessage is changed to dynamic array based on subcell type. Refer to 5G\_L1\_IF\_200\_replaced([11513831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).***\***\*

All parameters in the structure **PuschAntmeans, *such as shortTermTaMetricOfAnt , \*shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt and so on are no longer arrays. Refer to 5G\_L1\_IF\_202\_replaced([11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).***\*

Note: The requirement is common for all cases of Technology.

History:

As of CB010575-D, this requirement also applies to Thor for FR1-TDD-CPRI. As a parity from 5GC001294, A2, C2, A4, and C4 have been supported.

As of CB011178-A, this requirement also applies to FR1 FDD 7-2a eCPRI. As of CB010969-CB, the requirement applies to OBSAI.

#### 5.4.7.1.5 Time Offset Estimation for Thor and MU MIMO Receiver

**5.4.7.1.5.0-1**  (ID: `11403730`)

Time Offset Estimation for Thor and MU MIMO Receiver
For Thor and MU MIMO Receiver (C8):

5G-L1-UL estimates a short term (ST) timing offset (TO) on PUSCH and reports it to 5G-L2-PS within the *UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message, which could use it to update the TA measurement. Only one value shall be provided to 5G-L2-PS for both TO parameters* shortTermTaMetric and *shortTermTaPeakAmp sent in* UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message. The reported *shortTermTaMetric value shall be in unit of (1/2μ) \* Ts, as described in L1 IF [11513831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).*\*\*\*\*

For eCPRI case, the order eAxC spatial stream values of the antennas-wise PUSCH TO (shortTermTaMetricOfAnt) in the dynamic array structure **PuschAntMeas of** *UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message* *and their mapping to beam* patternId shall follow the same mapping order of *EcpriConfig struct in [11514653](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR4dkfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). The same rational applies for all antenna-wise values in UP ALg [11109505](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ko4tufvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).****\****\*

For each UE' antenna-wise ST TOE, the number of valid measurements is equal to the number of streams (2 or4) and corresponds to the ceAxC of the UE beam(s).

**Mapping between antenna-wise TO and spatial stream for eCPRI (example for 4UEs rank1)**

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Subcell Type (IE ulSubcellType, see [11513449](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRwhwfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | TO for antenna i and UE j  (j=0,1,2,3 per UE pair) , Refer to [11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). | eCPRI spatial stream | The First Feature |
| C8 | **PuschAntMeas[0].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt for UE 0** | ceAxC0 carries best beam for UE0 in UE pair | CB009363-F |
| **PuschAntMeas[1].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt for UE 0** | ceAxC1 carries best beam for UE0 in UE pair |  |  |
| … | … |  |  |
| **PuschAntMeas[2j].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt for UE j** | ceAxC[2j] carries best beam for UE j in UE pair |  |  |
| **PuschAntMeas[2j+1].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt for UE j** | ceAxC[2j+1] carries best beam for UE j in UE pair |  |  |
| … | … |  |  |
| **PuschAntMeas[6].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt for UE 3** | ceAxC6 carries best beam for UE3 in UE pair |  |  |
| **PuschAntMeas[7].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt for UE 3** | ceAxC7 carries best beam for UE3 in UE pair |  |  |

---

#### 5.4.7.1.6 Time Offset Estimation for Odin and SU MIMO Receiver

**5.4.7.1.6.0-1**  (ID: `12732037`)

Time Offset Estimation for Odin and SU MIMO Receiver
For Odin and SU MIMO Receiver:

5G-L1-UL estimates a short term (ST) timing offset (TO) on PUSCH and reports it to 5G-L2-PS within the *UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message, which could use it to update the TA measurement. Only one value shall be provided to 5G-L2-PS for both TO parameters* shortTermTaMetric and *shortTermTaPeakAmp sent in* UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message. The reported *shortTermTaMetric  value shall be in unit of (1/2μ) \* Ts, as described in L1 IF 200 [11513831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).*\*\*\*\*

Note that a successful measurement requires proper setting of timing advance at the UE which has to be configured manually in early subfeatures where random access procedure is still missing (before subfeature 5GC000212-H).

The search window length for time offset estimation is changed for PUSCH and the *shortTermTaMetric shall be adjusted with the new search window range (see L1 Entity [11402144](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e9IlqvvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).*

The timing offset estimation algorithm on PUSCH is described in section 2.3.4.1 of the 5GMax algorithm specifications (see L1 Entity [11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For Thor. Additionally, 5GNB 5G-L1-UL estimates and reports PUSCH per rx antenna stream *shortTermTaMetricOfAnt and* shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt, and sends them in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs *message.*\*\*

Note: although antenna-wise PUSCH TO is introduced for FR1 TDD Rx beamforming cells with eCPRI RU, L1's behavior is the same among:

- CPRI or eCPRI FR1 TDD 2RX beamforming

- CPRI or eCPRI FR1 TDD 2RX non beamforming

- CPRI FR1 TDD 4Rx non beamforming

- CPRI FR1 FDD 2RX non beamforming

- CPRI **FR1 FDD 4Rx non beamforming**

-     For Thor L1 HW, eCPRI **FR1 TDD 8Rx non beamforming**

For eCPRI case, the order eAxC spatial stream values of the antennas-wise PUSCH TO (shortTermTaMetricOfAnt) in the dynamic array structure **PuschAntMeas of** *UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs  message and their mapping to beam* patternId shall follow the same mapping order of *EcpriConfig struct in L1 IF [11514653](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR4dkfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). The same rational applies for all antenna-wise values in UP ALG [11109505](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ko4tufvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).***\***\*

For CPRI case, table below is used for the order of AxC spatial stream values. The same rationale applies for all antenna-wise values in L1 IF [11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

**Mapping between antenna-wise TO and spatial stream for (e)CPRI**

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Subcell Type (IE ulSubcellType, see 5G\_L1\_IF\_152\_replaced([11513449](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRwhwfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) | TO for antenna j (see 5G\_L1\_IF\_202\_replaced([11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) | CPRI spatial stream | The First Feature |
| A2 or C2 | **PuschAntMeas[0].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt** | (ec)AxC0 |  |
| **PuschAntMeas[1].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt** | (ec)AxC1 |  |  |
| A4 or C4 | **PuschAntMeas[0].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt** | (ec)AxC0 |  |
| **PuschAntMeas[1].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt** | (ec)AxC1 |  |  |
| **PuschAntMeas[2].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt** | (ec)AxC2 |  |  |
| **PuschAntMeas[3].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt** | (ec)AxC3 |  |  |
| C8 | **PuschAntMeas[0].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt** | ecAxC0 | **CB009363-D** |
| **PuschAntMeas[1].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt** | ecAxC1 |  |  |
| … | … |  |  |
| **PuschAntMeas[j].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt** | ecAxCj |  |  |
| … | … |  |  |
| **PuschAntMeas[7].shortTermTaMetricOfAnt** | ecAxC7 |  |  |

The structure **PuschAntMeas in** UlData*\_**PuschReceiveRespPsmessage is a dynamic array based on subcell type. Refer to L1 IF [11513831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).***\***\*

For the details of parameters in the structure **PuschAntMeans, *such as shortTermTaMetricOfAnt , \*shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt and so on, refer to L1 IF [11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).***\*

#### 5.4.7.1.7 Time Offset Estimation for Odin and MU MIMO Receiver

**5.4.7.1.7.0-1**  (ID: `12732044`)

Time Offset Estimation for Odin and MU MIMO Receiver
For Odin and MU MIMO Receiver (C8):

5G-L1-UL estimates a short term (ST) timing offset (TO) on PUSCH and reports it to 5G-L2-PS within the *UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message, which could use it to update the TA measurement. Only one value shall be provided to 5G-L2-PS for both TO parameters* shortTermTaMetric and *shortTermTaPeakAmp sent in* UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message. The reported *shortTermTaMetric value shall be in unit of (1/2μ) \* Ts, as described in L1 IF [11513831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).*\*\*\*\*

For eCPRI case, the order eAxC spatial stream values of the antennas-wise PUSCH TO (shortTermTaMetricOfAnt) in the dynamic array structure **PuschAntMeas of** *UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message* *and their mapping to beam* patternId shall follow the same mapping order of *EcpriConfig struct in [11514653](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR4dkfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). The same rational applies for all antenna-wise values in UP ALg [11109505](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ko4tufvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).****\****\*

For each UE' antenna-wise ST TOE, the number of valid measurements is equal to the number of streams (2 or4) and corresponds to the ceAxC of the UE beam(s).

#### 5.4.7.1.8 Time Offset Estimation on PUSCH for vDU L1 HW

**5.4.7.1.8.0-1**  (ID: `11403742`)

Time Offset Estimation on PUSCH for vDU L1 HW
[CNI-59405]: CP2 part moved

5G-L1-UL estimates a short term (ST) timing offset (TO) on PUSCH and reports it to 5G-L2-PS within the UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message, which could use it to update the TA measurement. Only one value shall be provided to 5G-L2-PS for both TO parameters shortTermTaMetric and shortTermTaPeakAmp sent in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message. The reported shortTermTaMetric  value shall be in unit of (1/2μ) \* Ts, as described in 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_199.

[5GC001972-A] For FDD, 5G-L1-UL shall also perform PUSCH TO estimation and provide this estimate to 5G-L2-PS in vDU L1 HW (FlexRAN SW). The shortTermTaMetric in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message shall be computed according to FLEX RAN algorithm (see 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_915).

[Before 5GC001972-B] The shortTermTaPeakAmp in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message shall be set to 0. [End 5GC001972-B] [End 5GC001972-A]

[5GC001972-B] For FDD and vDU L1 HW (FlexRAN SW), 5G-L1-UL shall compute shortTermTaMetric and shortTermTaPeakAmp according to FlexRan algorithm (see 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_915). Then, it reports them to L2-PS. [End 5GC001972-B]

[5GC002357-B] For vDU L1 HW (FDD only), 5G-L1-UL shall compute shortTermTaMetric according to vRAN algorithm (see 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_916, chapter 2.3.4 and 2.7.5 in 5Gmax algorithm specification). Then, it reports it them to L2-PS. [End 5GC002357-B]

[End CNI-59405]

---

#### 5.4.7.1.9 Time Offset Combining

**5.4.7.1.9.0-2**  (ID: `12732110`)

Time Offset Combining
5G-L1-UL (BB) shall combine the Timing Offset estimates of Rx antennas and report it to L2PS.

The number of configured Rx antenna is derived according the subcell type.

The timing offset combining algorithm is described in section [sec-MeasToComb](https://sv-ul-5gmax.dyn.nesc.nokia.net/AlgoSpec/main.pdf#sec-MeasToComb) of the 5Gmax algorithm specifications.

5G-L1-UL shall perform TO estimation as explained above in Loki L1 HW.

Invalid value of *shortTermTaMetric and shortTermTaMetricOfAnt shall be set to −32768.*

Invalid value of *shortTermTaPeakAmp and shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt shall be set to −1.*

The requirement is supported in Loner, Loki, and Thor. [CB012115-IA] The requirement shall also be supported in Odin. [End CB012115-IA]

---

#### 5.4.7.1.10 Reporting Invalid Time Offset

##### 5.4.7.1.10.1 Loner

**5.4.7.1.10.1.0-1**  (ID: `11403768`)

Loner
For PUSCH, 5G-L1-UL shall report invalid measurement for antenna-wise TOE(shortTermTaMetricOfAnt) and its associated peak amplitude(shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt) with message UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs when the Rx is failed (typically the case of RU lost or fiber broken or Rx failure).

Message detail is defined in 5G\_L1\_IF\_200\_replaced([11513831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_L1\_IF\_202\_replaced([11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Invalid value of shortTermTaMetricOfAnt shall be set to −32768. Invalid value of shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt shall be set to −1.

Note: reporting of invalid value does not depend on OAM parameter txPathFailureMode.

---

##### 5.4.7.1.10.2 Loki

**5.4.7.1.10.2.0-1**  (ID: `11403775`)

Loki
For PUSCH, 5G-L1-UL shall report invalid measurement for antenna-wise TOE(shortTermTaMetricOfAnt) and its associated peak amplitude(shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt) with message UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs when the Rx is failed (typically the case of RU lost or fiber broken or Rx failure).

Message detail is defined in 5G\_L1\_IF\_200\_replaced([11513831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_L1\_IF\_202\_replaced([11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Invalid value of shortTermTaMetricOfAnt shall be set to −32768. Invalid value of shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt shall be set to −1.

---

##### 5.4.7.1.10.3 Thor

**5.4.7.1.10.3.0-1**  (ID: `11403782`)

Thor
For PUSCH, 5G-L1-UL shall report invalid measurement for antenna-wise TOE(shortTermTaMetricOfAnt) and its associated peak amplitude(shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt) with message UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs when the Rx is failed (typically the case of RU lost or fiber broken or Rx failure).

Message detail is defined in 5G\_L1\_IF\_200\_replaced([11513831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_L1\_IF\_202\_replaced([11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Invalid value of shortTermTaMetricOfAnt shall be set to −32768. Invalid value of shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt shall be set to −1.

---

##### 5.4.7.1.10.4 Odin

**5.4.7.1.10.4.0-1**  (ID: `12732073`)

Odin
For PUSCH, 5G-L1-UL shall report invalid measurement for antenna-wise TOE(shortTermTaMetricOfAnt) and its associated peak amplitude(shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt) with message UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs **when the Rx is failed (typically the case of RU lost or fiber broken or Rx failure).**

Message detail is defined in L1 IF [11513831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) and L1 IF [11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

Invalid value of shortTermTaMetricOfAnt shall be set to −32768. Invalid value of shortTermTaPeakAmpOfAnt shall be set to −1.

---

### 5.4.7.2 Carrier Frequency Offset

#### 5.4.7.2.1 CFO Estimation Logic

##### 5.4.7.2.1.1 Legacy

**5.4.7.2.1.1.0-1**  (ID: `11401137`)

Legacy
Content of this requirement is frozen and valid until 23R3 release, For later releases please refer to the objects below.

For Loner [5GC001868-A] and Loki [End 5GC001868-A], [RP003187-E] and Thor [End RP003187-E] L1 HWs.

Carrier Frequency Offset (CFO) estimation shall be performed on PUSCH.

On Loner L1 HW, CFO compensation depends on the setting of the R&D parameter rdFocEnabledFlag (see 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_1503 5G\_L1\_3391).

On Loki and Thor, R&D parameter rdFocEnabledFlag  is not used and shall always be considered as true.

If rdFocEnabledFlag == True

Then

Upon reception of the UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message provided by 5G-L2-PS, the 5G-L1-UL shall derive:

[Before 5GC002244-D (Loner 4Rx MRC feature)]

For Loner [Before 5GC001294-B (Loki 4Rx IRC feature)][5GC001868-A (Loki L3 call feature)] and Loki [End 5GC001868-A] [End 5GC001294-B]  L1 HWs, a CFO estimate using the metric longTermCfoMetric contained in this message. This estimate shall be then used to compensate the CFO on PUSCH expected at the SFN and NR-slot specified in the same UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message.

[End 5GC002244-D]

[5GC002244-D]

For Loner L1 HW/ [5GC001294-B] For Loki L1 HW [End 5GC001294-B], a LT CFO estimate using the metric [Before CB009363-D]longTermCfoMetricOfAnt [CB009363-D] longTermCfoMetricOfBeam [End CB009363-D] contained in this message. The estimate shall be then used to compensate the CFO on PUSCH received on the appropriate spatial stream (expected at the SFN and NR-slot specified in the same UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message). The relationship between the elements of [Before CB009363-D]longTermCfoMetricOfAnt [CB009363-D] longTermCfoMetricOfBeam [End CB009363-D] and the spatial streams is given in 5G\_L1\_7363\_replaced([11403824](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e9RIiPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The metric longTermCfoMetric shall not be used anymore.

[End 5GC002244-D]

5G-L1-UL shall carry out a CFO compensation in frequency domain (post-FFT) for both data and DMRS.

Else

For Loner [5GC001868-A] and Loki [End 5GC001868-A] L1 HWs,  5G-L1-UL ignores the IE longTermCfoMetric in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message and does not perform CFO compensation

[5GC002244-D]

For Loner L1 HW / [5GC001294-B] For Loki L1 HW [End 5GC001294-B], 5G-L1-UL ignores the IE [Before CB009363-D]longTermCfoMetricOfAnt [CB009363-D] longTermCfoMetricOfBeam [End CB009363-D] in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message and does not perform CFO compensation

[End 5GC002244-D]

End

The CFO estimation and compensation algorithms on PUSCH are described in section 2.3.2 of the 5GMax algorithm specification  (see 5G\_L1\_7703\_replaced([11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The derivation of a CFO estimate from the associated metric is also described in the same section.

[5GC002244-D]

For L1 Loner HW/ [5GC001294-B] For Loki L1 HW [End 5GC001294-B], the antenna wise CFO estimation and compensation algorithms on PUSCH are described in section XXX of the 5GMax algorithm specification  (see 5G\_L1\_7703\_replaced([11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The derivation of a CFO estimate from the associated metric is also described in the same section.

[End 5GC002244-D]

For Loner, [5GC001868-A] Loki [End 5GC001868-A] and [RP003187-D, RP003187-K] Thor [End RP003187-D, RP003187-K] L1 HWs, 5G-L1-UL shall choose the appropriate method to estimate the CFO according to the following algorithm (see below). Then, 5G-L1-UL reports the estimated CFO metric to 5G-L2-PS in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message for LT averaging.

[5GC002244-D] For L1 Loner only / [5GC001294-B] For Loki L1 HW [End 5GC001294-B] and [RP003187-D, RP003187-K] L1 Thor [End RP003187-D, RP003187-K], additionally 5G-L1-UL shall perform antennas-wise ST FOE and report it to 5G-L2-PS in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message for LT averaging, through the IE shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt, see 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_201 5G\_L1\_IF\_202\_replaced([11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The mapping of each element of the IE shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt to the spatial stream is provided in 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_982 5G\_L1\_7363\_replaced([11403824](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e9RIiPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End 5GC002244-D]

If  (numOfDmrsSymbols ≥ 2)

Process FOE on the first 2 DMRS symbols, and drop the remaining DMRSs

Else

If (ulPtrsFlag == 0)

skip FOE

set ST FOE metric to  “0”

Else

Process FOE on PTRS

Endif

Endif

With

* ulPtrsFlag is got from UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message;
* numOfDmrsSymbols stands for the number of DMRS symbols per slot that might be used by CFO estimation (see 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_976 5G\_L1\_7339\_replaced([11401166](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e9B38vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));
* ”Process FOE on the first 2 DMRS symbols, and drop the remaining DMRSs” means that FOE estimation shall be performed at 5G-L1-UL as described in section 2.3.2.2 of the 5Gmax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_L1\_7703\_replaced([11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));
* ”Process FOE on PTRS” means that FOE estimation shall be performed at 5G-L1-UL as described in section 2.3.2.1 of the 5Gmax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_L1\_7703\_replaced([11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

[5GC000545-A; 5GC000545-B; 5GC000545-C, CB007781-A, RP003187-E, RP003187-L, CB007814-G]

When transform precoding is enabled (i.e. puschTransformPrecoderFlag = 1, see 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_194 5G\_L1\_IF\_195\_replaced([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and FOE is based on DMRS, 5G-L1-UL shall compute this estimate in the similar way as for transform precoding disabled, as described in section 2.3.3.8.2 of the 5Gmax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_916 5G\_L1\_7703\_replaced([11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

[End 5GC000545-A; 5GC000545-B; 5GC000545-C, CB007781-A,  RP003187-E, RP003187-L, CB007814-G]

[5GC000545-A; 5GC000545-B; 5GC000545-C, CB007781-A,  RP003187-E, RP003187-L, CB007814-G]

When transform precoding is enabled (i.e. puschTransformPrecoderFlag = 1, see 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_194 5G\_L1\_IF\_195\_replaced([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and FOE is based on PTRS, 5G-L1-UL shall compute this estimate after IDFT as described in section 2.3.3.8.1 of the 5Gmax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_916 5G\_L1\_7703\_replaced([11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

When transform precoding is enabled, no additional DMRS, PTRS is on and FR1 is used, BTS L1 should calculate one value ST FOE for all antennas. In order to get ST FOE per antenna Rx, L1 should duplicate the combined ST FOE, over all antennas, for all RX antennas measurements.

[End 5GC000545-A; 5GC000545-B; 5GC000545-C, CB007781-A,  RP003187-E, RP003187-L, CB007814-G]

[RP003187-D, RP003187-K] L1 Thor shall perform CFO estimation and compensation algorithms on PUSCH are described in section "2.3.3 Frequency Offset Estimation and Compensation" of the 5GMax algorithm specification and report estimated CFO metric to 5G-L2-PS [End RP003187-D, RP003187-K]

[RP003187-D, RP003187-K]

Itv value is the symbol interval between two symbols involved in a short term correlation computation.

L1 Thor shall support Itv value 4 which is used by L1 to adjust the time interval to combine the correlations (DMRS,PTRS) during long term averaging at L2.

[End RP003187-D, RP003187-K]

[RP003187-E, RP003187-L] The requirement is also applicable for L1 Thor with transform precoding enabled. CFO estimation and compensation algorithms on PUSCH are described in section "2.3.3 Frequency Offset Estimation and Compensation" of the 5GMax algorithm specification [End RP003187-E, RP003187-L]

[CB008205-B, CB008205-C] 5G-L1-UL shall also support requirements above in ABIO for O-RAN compliant FR1 FDD eCPRI. [End CB008205-B, CB008205-C]

[CB009443-C] This requirement is also appliable for RINLINE 1 HW for FR1-TDD-eCPRI. [end CB009443-C]

[CB009363-D]

The parameter longTermCfoMetricOfAnt is changed to longTermCfoMetricOfBeam in MULTI and L1SW in 23R4. Refer to 5G\_L1\_13041\_replaced([11396378](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8r5xPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CB009363-D]

---

##### 5.4.7.2.1.2 Loner and Loki

**5.4.7.2.1.2.0-1**  (ID: `11401143`)

Loner and Loki
For Loner and Loki L1 HWs:

Carrier Frequency Offset (CFO) estimation shall be performed on PUSCH.

On Loner L1 HW, CFO compensation depends on the setting of the R&D parameter rdFocEnabledFlag (see 5G\_L1\_3391).

On Loki, R&D parameter rdFocEnabledFlag  is not used and shall always be considered as true.

If rdFocEnabledFlag == True

Then

Upon reception of the UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message provided by 5G-L2-PS, the 5G-L1-UL shall derive:

For Loner L1 and Loki L1 HW, an antenna-wise CFO estimate using the metric longTermCfoMetricOfBeam contained in this message. The antenna-wise estimate shall be then used to compensate the CFO on PUSCH received on the appropriate spatial stream (expected at the SFN and NR-slot specified in the same UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message). The relationship between the elements of longTermCfoMetricOfBeam and the spatial streams is given in 5G\_L1\_7363\_replaced([11403824](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e9RIiPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The metric longTermCfoMetric shall not be used anymore.

5G-L1-UL shall carry out a CFO compensation in frequency domain (post-FFT) for both data and DMRS.

Else

For Loner and Loki L1 HWs,  5G-L1-UL ignores the IE longTermCfoMetric in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message and does not perform CFO compensation

For Loner and Loki L1 HWs, 5G-L1-UL ignores the IE longTermCfoMetricOfBeam in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message and does not perform CFO compensation

End

The CFO estimation and compensation algorithms on PUSCH are described in section 2.3.2 of the 5GMax algorithm specification (see 5G\_L1\_7703\_replaced([11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The derivation of a CFO estimate from the associated metric is also described in the same section.

For L1 Loner and Loki L1 HW, the antenna wise CFO estimation and compensation algorithms on PUSCH are described in section XXX of the 5GMax algorithm specification(see 5G\_L1\_7703\_replaced([11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The derivation of a CFO estimate from the associated metric is also described in the same section.

For Loner and Loki L1 HWs, 5G-L1-UL shall choose the appropriate method to estimate the CFO according to the following algorithm (see below). Then, 5G-L1-UL reports the estimated CFO metric to 5G-L2-PS in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message for LT averaging.

For L1 Loner and Loki L1 HW, additionally 5G-L1-UL shall perform antennas-wise ST FOE and report it to 5G-L2-PS in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message for LT averaging, through the IE shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt, see 5G\_L1\_IF\_202\_replaced([11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The mapping of each element of the IE shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt to the spatial stream is provided in 5G\_L1\_7363\_replaced([11403824](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e9RIiPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If  (numOfDmrsSymbols ≥ 2)

Process FOE on the first 2 DMRS symbols, and drop the remaining DMRSs

Else

If (ulPtrsFlag == 0)

skip FOE

set ST FOE metric to  “0”

Else

Process FOE on PTRS

Endif

Endif

With

* ulPtrsFlag is got from UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message;
* numOfDmrsSymbols stands for the number of DMRS symbols per slot that might be used by CFO estimation (see 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_976 5G\_L1\_7339\_replaced([11401166](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e9B38vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));
* ”Process FOE on the first 2 DMRS symbols, and drop the remaining DMRSs” means that FOE estimation shall be performed at 5G-L1-UL as described in section 2.3.2.2 of the 5Gmax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_L1\_7703\_replaced([11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));
* ”Process FOE on PTRS” means that FOE estimation shall be performed at 5G-L1-UL as described in section 2.3.2.1 of the 5Gmax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_L1\_7703\_replaced([11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

When transform precoding is enabled (i.e. puschTransformPrecoderFlag = 1, see 5G\_L1\_IF\_195\_replaced([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and FOE is based on DMRS, 5G-L1-UL shall compute this estimate in the similar way as for transform precoding disabled, as described in section 2.3.3.8.2 of the 5Gmax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_L1\_7703\_replaced([11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

When transform precoding is enabled (i.e. puschTransformPrecoderFlag = 1, see 5G\_L1\_IF\_195\_replaced([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and FOE is based on PTRS, 5G-L1-UL shall compute this estimate after IDFT as described in section 2.3.3.8.1 of the 5Gmax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_L1\_7703\_replaced([11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

When transform precoding is enabled, no additional DMRS, PTRS is on and FR1 is used, BTS L1 should calculate one value ST FOE for all antennas. In order to get ST FOE per antenna Rx, L1 should duplicate the combined ST FOE, over all antennas, for all RX antennas measurements.

Itv value is the symbol interval between two symbols involved in a short term correlation computation.

5G-L1-UL shall also support requirements above in ABIO for O-RAN compliant FR1 FDD eCPRI.

[Before-CNI-122313-A]

This requirement is also appliable for RINLINE 1 HW for FR1-TDD-eCPRI.

[CNI-122313-A]

RINLINE1 HW is supported until 24R1 inclusive. RINLINE1 HW is not supported since 24R2.

[End CNI-122313-A]

---

##### 5.4.7.2.1.3 Thor

**5.4.7.2.1.3.0-1**  (ID: `11401150`)

Thor
For Thor L1 HWs:

Carrier Frequency Offset (CFO) estimation shall be performed on PUSCH.

On Thor, R&D parameter rdFocEnabledFlag  is not used and shall always be considered as true.

If rdFocEnabledFlag == True

Then

Upon reception of the UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message provided by 5G-L2-PS, the 5G-L1-UL shall derive:

For Thor L1 HW, LT CFO estimate using the metric **[Before CB009363-D]longTermCfoMetricOfAnt** [CB009363-D] longTermCfoMetricOfBeam **[End CB009363-D] contained in this message. The estimate shall be then used to compensate the CFO on PUSCH received on the appropriate spatial stream (expected at the SFN and NR-slot specified in the same** UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message). The relationship between the elements of **[Before CB009363-D]longTermCfoMetricOfAnt** [CB009363-D] longTermCfoMetricOfBeam **[End CB009363-D]and the spatial streams is given in 5G\_L1\_7363\_replaced([11403824](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e9RIiPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The metric longTermCfoMetric shall not be used anymore.*****\******\***

5G-L1-UL shall carry out a CFO compensation in frequency domain (post-FFT) for both data and DMRS.

Else

For Thor L1 HWs,  5G-L1-UL ignores the IE longTermCfoMetric in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message and does not perform CFO compensation

For Thori L1 HWs, 5G-L1-UL ignores the IE longTermCfoMetricOfBeam in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message and does not perform CFO compensation

End

The CFO estimation and compensation algorithms on PUSCH are described in section 2.3.2 of the 5GMax algorithm specification  (see 5G\_L1\_7703\_replaced([11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The derivation of a CFO estimate from the associated metric is also described in the same section.

For Thor **L1 HWs, 5G-L1-UL shall choose the appropriate method to estimate the CFO according to the following algorithm (see below). Then, 5G-L1-UL reports the estimated CFO metric to 5G-L2-PS in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message for LT averaging.**

For L1 Thor, additionally 5G-L1-UL shall perform antennas-wise ST FOE and report it to 5G-L2-PS in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message for LT averaging, through the IE shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt, see  5G\_L1\_IF\_202\_replaced([11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The mapping of each element of the IE shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt to the spatial stream is provided in 5G\_L1\_7363\_replaced([11403824](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e9RIiPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If  (numOfDmrsSymbols ≥ 2)

Process FOE on the first 2 DMRS symbols, and drop the remaining DMRSs

Else

If (ulPtrsFlag == 0)

skip FOE

set ST FOE metric to  “0”

Else

Process FOE on PTRS

Endif

Endif

With

* ulPtrsFlag is got from UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message;
* numOfDmrsSymbols stands for the number of DMRS symbols per slot that might be used by CFO estimation (see 5G\_L1\_7339\_replaced([11401166](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e9B38vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));
* ”Process FOE on the first 2 DMRS symbols, and drop the remaining DMRSs” means that FOE estimation shall be performed at 5G-L1-UL as described in section 2.3.2.2 of the 5Gmax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_L1\_7703\_replaced([11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));
* ”Process FOE on PTRS” means that FOE estimation shall be performed at 5G-L1-UL as described in section 2.3.2.1 of the 5Gmax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_L1\_7703\_replaced([11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

When transform precoding is enabled (i.e. puschTransformPrecoderFlag = 1, see 5G\_L1\_IF\_195\_replaced([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and FOE is based on DMRS, 5G-L1-UL shall compute this estimate in the similar way as for transform precoding disabled, as described in section 2.3.3.8.2 of the 5Gmax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_L1\_7703\_replaced([11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

When transform precoding is enabled (i.e. puschTransformPrecoderFlag = 1, see 5G\_L1\_IF\_195\_replaced([11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and FOE is based on PTRS, 5G-L1-UL shall compute this estimate after IDFT as described in section 2.3.3.8.1 of the 5Gmax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_L1\_7703\_replaced([11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

When transform precoding is enabled, no additional DMRS, PTRS is on and FR1 is used, BTS L1 should calculate one value ST FOE for all antennas. In order to get ST FOE per antenna Rx, L1 should duplicate the combined ST FOE, over all antennas, for all RX antennas measurements.

**L1 Thor shall perform CFO estimation and compensation algorithms on PUSCH are described in section "2.3.3 Frequency Offset Estimation and Compensation" of the 5GMax algorithm specification and report estimated CFO metric to 5G-L2-PS**

Itv value is the symbol interval between two symbols involved in a short term correlation computation.

**L1 Thor shall support Itv value 4 which is used by L1 to adjust** the time interval to combine the correlations (DMRS,PTRS) during long term averaging at L2.\*\*\*\*

The requirement is also applicable for **L1 Thor with transform precoding enabled.** CFO estimation and compensation algorithms on PUSCH are described in section "2.3.3 Frequency Offset Estimation and Compensation" of the 5GMax algorithm specification**.**\*\*\*\*

**[CB009363-D]**

The parameter longTermCfoMetricOfAnt is changed to longTermCfoMetricOfBeam in MULTI and L1SW in 23R4. Refer to 5G\_L1\_13041\_replaced([11396378](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8r5xPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

**[End CB009363-D]**

**[CB010575-D] This requirement also applies to Thor for FR1-TDD-CPRI.** [End CB010575-D]\*\*\*\*

**[CB011178-A] 5G-L1-UL shall also support requirements above for FR1 FDD 7-2a eCPRI for Thor.** [End CB011178-A]\*\*\*\*

**Notice: This requirement is not** FH **Mode, nor** Duplex Mode dependent. One difference for Loner is that rdFocEnabledFlag parameter can be True or False in practice, while for SoCs that come after the parameter should always be considered as True. Besides, the functionality presented in this requirement involves additional steps compared to 5G\_L1\_13105\_replaced([11401150](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e9B38fvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Note that replacing longTermCfoMetricOfAnt with longTermCfoMetricOfBeam is applied everywhere, since it is an interface parameter. L1SW is advised to implement this requirement considering the SoC specificities laid out in section 2.3.3 of the 5GMax Algorithm Specification. The following table does not impose any further technical restriction, nor it provides any information in that regard. It only contains the history of implementation. (table to be completed during the Spec refactoring in compliance with Release Based Versioning)***\****\*

HW-Technology Map:

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  | Loner | Loki | Thor |
| FR1-FDD-CPRI |  |  | Supported |
| FR1 FDD OBSAI |  |  | **[CB010969-SR-CB] Supported** [End CB010969-SR-CB]\*\*\*\* |
| FR1-FDD-7-2a-eCPRI |  |  | **[CB011178-A]Supported**[End CB011178-A]\*\*\*\* |
| FR1-TDD-CPRI |  |  | **[CB010575-D] Supported** [End CB010575-D]\*\*\*\* |
| FR1-TDD-7-2a-eCPRI |  |  |  |
| FR2-TDD-CPRI |  |  |  |
| FR2-TDD-7-2a-eCPRI |  |  |  |

---

##### 5.4.7.2.1.4 Odin

**5.4.7.2.1.4.0-1**  (ID: `12732275`)

Odin
For Odin L1 HWs:

Carrier Frequency Offset (CFO) estimation shall be performed on PUSCH.

On Thor, R&D parameter rdFocEnabledFlag  is not used and shall always be considered as true.

If rdFocEnabledFlag == True

Then

Upon reception of the UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message provided by 5G-L2-PS, the 5G-L1-UL shall derive:

For Thor L1 HW, LT CFO estimate using the metric longTermCfoMetricOfBeam contained in this message. The estimate shall be then used to compensate the CFO on PUSCH received on the appropriate spatial stream (expected at the SFN and NR-slot specified in the same **UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message). The relationship between the elements of longTermCfoMetricOfBeam and the spatial streams is given in [11403824](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e9RIiPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). The metric longTermCfoMetric shall not be used anymore.**

5G-L1-UL shall carry out a CFO compensation in frequency domain (post-FFT) for both data and DMRS.

Else

For Thor L1 HWs,  5G-L1-UL ignores the IE longTermCfoMetric in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message and does not perform CFO compensation

For Thori L1 HWs, 5G-L1-UL ignores the IE longTermCfoMetricOfBeam in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message and does not perform CFO compensation

End

The CFO estimation and compensation algorithms on PUSCH are described in section 2.3.2 of the 5GMax algorithm specification  (see [11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The derivation of a CFO estimate from the associated metric is also described in the same section.

For Thor **L1 HWs, 5G-L1-UL shall choose the appropriate method to estimate the CFO according to the following algorithm (see below). Then, 5G-L1-UL reports the estimated CFO metric to 5G-L2-PS in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message for LT averaging.**

For L1 Thor, additionally 5G-L1-UL shall perform antennas-wise ST FOE and report it to 5G-L2-PS in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message for LT averaging, through the IE shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt, see  [11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). The mapping of each element of the IE shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt to the spatial stream is provided in [11403824](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e9RIiPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

If  (numOfDmrsSymbols ≥ 2)

Process FOE on the first 2 DMRS symbols, and drop the remaining DMRSs

Else

If (ulPtrsFlag == 0)

skip FOE

set ST FOE metric to  “0”

Else

Process FOE on PTRS

Endif

Endif

With

* ulPtrsFlag is got from UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message;
* numOfDmrsSymbols stands for the number of DMRS symbols per slot that might be used by CFO estimation (see [11401166](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e9B38vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));
* ”Process FOE on the first 2 DMRS symbols, and drop the remaining DMRSs” means that FOE estimation shall be performed at 5G-L1-UL as described in section 2.3.2.2 of the 5Gmax algorithm specifications (see [11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));
* ”Process FOE on PTRS” means that FOE estimation shall be performed at 5G-L1-UL as described in section 2.3.2.1 of the 5Gmax algorithm specifications (see [11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

When transform precoding is enabled (i.e. puschTransformPrecoderFlag = 1, see [11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and FOE is based on DMRS, 5G-L1-UL shall compute this estimate in the similar way as for transform precoding disabled, as described in section 2.3.3.8.2 of the 5Gmax algorithm specifications (see [11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

When transform precoding is enabled (i.e. puschTransformPrecoderFlag = 1, see [11513778](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and FOE is based on PTRS, 5G-L1-UL shall compute this estimate after IDFT as described in section 2.3.3.8.1 of the 5Gmax algorithm specifications (see [11396538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8tH1vvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

When transform precoding is enabled, no additional DMRS, PTRS is on and FR1 is used, BTS L1 should calculate one value ST FOE for all antennas. In order to get ST FOE per antenna Rx, L1 should duplicate the combined ST FOE, over all antennas, for all RX antennas measurements.

**L1 Odin shall perform CFO estimation and compensation algorithms on PUSCH are described in section "2.3.3 Frequency Offset Estimation and Compensation" of the 5GMax algorithm specification and report estimated CFO metric to 5G-L2-PS**

Itv value is the symbol interval between two symbols involved in a short term correlation computation.

**L1 Odin shall support Itv value 4 which is used by L1 to adjust** the time interval to combine the correlations (DMRS,PTRS) during long term averaging at L2.\*\*\*\*

The requirement is also applicable for **L1 Odin with transform precoding enabled.** CFO estimation and compensation algorithms on PUSCH are described in section "2.3.3 Frequency Offset Estimation and Compensation" of the 5GMax algorithm specification**.**\*\*\*\*

---

#### 5.4.7.2.2 CFO Estimation

##### 5.4.7.2.2.0-1 CFO Estimation For legacy features, refer to 13342398 in chapter 18: Frozen Requirements. (ID: 13342417)

##### 5.4.7.2.2.1 Loner

**5.4.7.2.2.1.0-1**  (ID: `11403830`)

Loner
For Loner:

L1-SW shall estimate an antenna-wise ST FOE (see 5G\_L1\_7338\_replaced([11401137](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e9BQ7fvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The mapping of each element of the IE shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt to the spatial stream depends on CPRI and eCPRI configuration as below. The similar mapping shall be considered for the LT estimate received via the IE longTermCfoMetricOfBeam.

 eCPRI configuration

For eCPRI case, the order eAxC spatial stream values of the antennas-wise ST-FOE (shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt) and LT-FOE (longTermCfoMetricOfBeam) in the array and their mapping to beam patternId shall follow the same mapping order of eCpriConfig struct in 5G\_L1\_IF\_266\_replaced([11514653](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR4dkfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 CPRI configuration

For CPRI case, table below is used for the order of AxC spatial stream values.

Mapping between antenna-wise ST FOE/LT FOE and spatial stream for CPRI

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Subcell Type (IE ulSubcellType, see 5G\_L1\_IF\_152\_replaced([11513449](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRwhwfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) | ST FOE for antenna i (IE shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt, see 5G\_L1\_IF\_202\_replaced([11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) | LT FOE for antenna i (IE longTermCfoMetricOfBeam, see 5G\_L1\_IF\_191\_replaced([11513756](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy99_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) | CPRI spatial stream |
| A2 or C2 | puschAntMeas[0].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam [0] | AxC0 |
| puschAntMeas[1].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam [1] | AxC1 |  |
| A4 or C4 | puschAntMeas[0].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam [0] | AxC0 |
| puschAntMeas[1].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam [1] | AxC1 |  |
| puschAntMeas[2].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam [2] | AxC2 |  |
| puschAntMeas[3].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam [3] | AxC3 |  |

Note 1: CPRI FR1 TDD 4Rx beamforming is not supported. Thus antenna-wise ST-FOE and FOC for PUSCH is not designed to support CPRI FR1 TDD 4Rx beamforming. Reason behind is that, in CPRI 4Rx beamforming cells, beam pattern Id mapping to AxC Id is not specified. 5G-L2-PS doesn’t know beam pattern Id’s mapping to AxC stream, and thus can’t perform beam specific FO handling.

Note 2: although antenna-wise ST-FOE and FOC is introduced for FR1 TDD Rx beamforming cells with eCPRI RU, L1's behavior is the same among:

- CPRI or eCPRI FR1 TDD 2RX beamforming

- CPRI or eCPRI FR1 TDD 2RX non beamforming

- CPRI FR1 TDD 4Rx non beamforming

- CPRI FR1 FDD 2RX non beamforming

- CPRI FR1 FDD 4Rx non beamforming

- FR2 TDD 2Rx

---

##### 5.4.7.2.2.2 Loki

**5.4.7.2.2.2.0-1**  (ID: `11403837`)

Loki
For Loki:

5G-L1-UL shall estimate an antenna-wise ST FOE (see 5G\_L1\_7338\_replaced([11401137](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e9BQ7fvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The mapping of each element of the IE shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt to the spatial stream depends on CPRI and eCPRI configuration as below. The similar mapping shall be considered for the LT estimate received via the IE longTermCfoMetricOfBeam.

 eCPRI configuration

For eCPRI case, the order eAxC spatial stream values of the antennas-wise ST-FOE (shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt) and LT-FOE (longTermCfoMetricOfBeam) in the array and their mapping to beam patternId shall follow the same mapping order of eCpriConfig struct in 5G\_L1\_IF\_266\_replaced([11514653](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR4dkfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 CPRI configuration

For CPRI case, table below is used for the order of AxC spatial stream values.

**Mapping between antenna-wise ST FOE/LT FOE and spatial stream for CPRI**

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Subcell Type (IE ulSubcellType, see 5G\_L1\_IF\_152\_replaced([11513449](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRwhwfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) | ST FOE for antenna i (IE shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt, see 5G\_L1\_IF\_202\_replaced([11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) | LT FOE for antenna i (IE longTermCfoMetricOfBeam, see 5G\_L1\_IF\_191\_replaced([11513756](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy99_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) | CPRI spatial stream |
| A2 or C2 | **puschAntMeas[0].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam [0] | AxC0 |
| **puschAntMeas[1].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam [1] | AxC1 |  |
| A4 or C4 | **puschAntMeas[0].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam [0] | AxC0 |
| **puschAntMeas[1].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam [1] | AxC1 |  |
| **puschAntMeas[2].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam [2] | AxC2 |  |
| **puschAntMeas[3].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam [3] | AxC3 |  |

Note 1: CPRI FR1 TDD 4Rx beamforming is not supported. Thus antenna-wise ST-FOE and FOC for PUSCH is not designed to support CPRI FR1 TDD 4Rx beamforming. Reason behind is that, in CPRI 4Rx beamforming cells, beam pattern Id mapping to AxC Id is not specified. 5G-L2-PS doesn’t know beam pattern Id’s mapping to AxC stream, and thus can’t perform beam specific FO handling.

Note 2: although antenna-wise ST-FOE and FOC is introduced for FR1 TDD Rx beamforming cells with eCPRI RU, L1's behavior is the same among:

- CPRI or eCPRI FR1 TDD 2RX beamforming

- CPRI or eCPRI FR1 TDD 2RX non beamforming

- CPRI FR1 TDD 4Rx non beamforming

- CPRI FR1 FDD 2RX non beamforming

- CPRI FR1 FDD 4Rx non beamforming

-     For Loki L1 HW, eCPRI **FR1 FDD 4Rx non beamforming**

-     For Loki L1 HW, eCPRI **FR1 FDD 2Rx non beamforming**

- FR2 TDD 2Rx

5G-L1-UL shall also support requirements above in ABIO for O-RAN compliant FR1 FDD eCPRI.

---

##### 5.4.7.2.2.3 SU Receiver in Thor

**5.4.7.2.2.3.0-2**  (ID: `12687089`)

SU Receiver in Thor
For Thor and SU receiver

5G-L1-UL shall perform an antenna-wise Short-term Frequency Offset Estimation (ST FOE) (see 5G\_L1\_7338\_replaced([11401137](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e9BQ7fvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The mapping of each element of the IE shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt to the spatial stream depends on CPRI and eCPRI configuration as below. The similar mapping shall be considered for the Long-term estimate (LT FOE) received via the IE longTermCfoMetricOfBeam.

[CB008465-AA]

For NR FDD non-beamforming deployments, when UL CoMP is enabled, for each UE scheduled on PUSCH and configured as joint reception, 5G-L1-UL shall perform antenna-wise ST FOE on the Helper subcell in addition to the Serving subcell. For UL CoMP, the number of measurements would be twice the number of antennas for a single cell (8 in case of A4 subcell) and then shall be reported to 5G-L2-PS using UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs.PuschAntMeas.shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt with Serving subcell measurements always placed first and that Helper subcell measurements follow contiguously.

The mapping between ST FOE and LT FOE for CPRI AxC spatial streams of Serving and Helper subcells is as follows

|  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Subcell Type | Subcell | ST FOE for antenna i | LT FOE for antenna j | CPRI spatial stream | **First feature** |
| A4 | Serving | **puschAntMeas[0].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[0] | AxC0 | CB008465-AA |
| **puschAntMeas[1].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[1] | AxC1 |  |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[2].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[2] | AxC2 |  |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[3].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[3] | AxC3 |  |  |  |
| Helper | **puschAntMeas[4].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[0] | AxC0 |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[5].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[1] | AxC1 |  |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[6].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[2] | AxC2 |  |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[7].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[3] | AxC3 |  |  |  |

[End CB008465-AA]

 eCPRI configuration:

For eCPRI case, the order eAxC spatial stream values of the antennas-wise ST-FOE (shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt) in 5G\_L1\_IF\_202\_replaced([11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) and LT-FOE (longTermCfoMetricOfBeam) in 5G\_L1\_IF\_191\_replaced([11513756](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy99_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) and their mapping to beam patternId shall follow the same mapping order of EcpriConfig struct in 5G\_L1\_IF\_266\_replaced([11514653](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR4dkfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 CPRI configuration:

For CPRI case, table below is used for the order of AxC spatial stream values.

**Mapping between ST FOE/LT FOE and spatial stream for (e)CPRI**

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Subcell Type | ST FOE for antenna i | LT FOE for antenna j | (e)CPRI spatial stream | **First feature** |
| A2 or C2 | **puschAntMeas[0].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[0] | (ce)AxC0 | **CB009363-D** |
| **puschAntMeas[1].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[1] | (ce)AxC1 |  |  |
| A4 or C4 | **puschAntMeas[0].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[0] | (ce)AxC0 | **CB009363-D** |
| **puschAntMeas[1].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[1] | (ce)AxC1 |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[2].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[2] | (ce)AxC2 |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[3].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[3] | (ce)AxC3 |  |  |
| C8 [CB013442-D] or A8 [End CB013442-D] | **puschAntMeas[0].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[0] | ceAxC0 | **CB009363-D** |
| **puschAntMeas[1].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[0] | ceAxC1 |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[2].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[1] | ceAxC2 |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[3].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[1] | ceAxC3 |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[4].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[2] | ceAxC4 |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[5].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[2] | ceAxC5 |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[6].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[3] | ceAxC6 |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[7].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[3] | ceAxC7 |  |  |

Note 1: CPRI FR1 TDD 4Rx beamforming is not supported. Thus antenna-wise ST-FOE and FOC for PUSCH is not designed to support CPRI FR1 TDD 4Rx beamforming. Reason behind is that, in CPRI 4Rx beamforming cells, beam pattern Id mapping to AxC Id is not specified. 5G-L2-PS doesn’t know beam pattern Id’s mapping to AxC stream, and thus can’t perform beam specific FO handling.

Note 2: although antenna-wise ST-FOE and FOC is introduced for FR1 TDD Rx beamforming cells with eCPRI RU, L1's behavior is the same among:

- CPRI or eCPRI FR1 TDD 2RX beamforming

- CPRI or eCPRI FR1 TDD 2RX non beamforming

- CPRI FR1 TDD 4Rx non beamforming

- CPRI FR1 FDD 2RX non beamforming

- CPRI FR1 FDD 4Rx non beamforming

-     For Thor L1 HW eCPRI FR1 TDD 8RX beamforming

-**[CB013442-D] eCPRI FR1 FDD 8Rx beamforming/non-beamforming [End CB013442-D]**

**L1 Thor shall estimate antenna-wise ST-FOE and LT-FOE as described above**

Note 3:

As of CB009363-D, the structure **puschAntMeas in** UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message is changed to dynamic structure array based on subcell type. Refer to 5G\_L1\_IF\_200\_replaced([11513831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).\*\*\*\*

The parameter shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt in the structure **puschAntMeas is no longer array. Refer to 5G\_L1\_IF\_202\_replaced([11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

The parameter longTermCfoMetricOfAnt in **UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message is changed to longTermCfoMetricOfBeam in MULTI and L1SW in 23R3. Refer to 5G\_L1\_IF\_191\_replaced([11513756](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy99_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_L1\_13041\_replaced([11396378](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8r5xPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

History:

As of CB010575-D, this requirement also applies to Thor for FR1-TDD-CPRI for which, as a parity from 5GC001294, A2, C2, A4, and C4 shall be supported.

As of CB011178-A, this requirement also applies to FR1 FDD 7-2a eCPRI for Thor, except for A8.

As of CB013442-D, this requirement also applies to A8.

---

##### 5.4.7.2.2.4 MU Receiver in Thor

###### 5.4.7.2.2.4.0-2 MU Receiver in Thor When C8 subcell is configured and UEs having UL MU-MIMO pairing case, L1 shall support ST CFO and TO measurements, which are computed on UE's own beams. ST CFO and TO on other UE's beams are set to INVALID. Refer to 5G_UP_ALG_19620_replaced( 11104196 ). (ID: 11402030)

##### 5.4.7.2.2.5 SU Receiver in Odin

**5.4.7.2.2.5.0-1**  (ID: `12732278`)

SU Receiver in Odin
For Odin and SU receiver

5G-L1-UL shall perform an antenna-wise Short-term Frequency Offset Estimation (ST FOE) (see 5G\_L1\_7338\_replaced([11401137](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e9BQ7fvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The mapping of each element of the IE shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt to the spatial stream depends on CPRI and eCPRI configuration as below. The similar mapping shall be considered for the Long-term estimate (LT FOE) received via the IE longTermCfoMetricOfBeam.

 eCPRI configuration:

For eCPRI case, the order eAxC spatial stream values of the antennas-wise ST-FOE (shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt) in 5G\_L1\_IF\_202\_replaced([11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) and LT-FOE (longTermCfoMetricOfBeam) in [11513756](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy99_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) and their mapping to beam patternId shall follow the same mapping order of EcpriConfig struct in [11514653](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR4dkfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

 CPRI configuration:

For CPRI case, table below is used for the order of AxC spatial stream values.

**Mapping between ST FOE/LT FOE and spatial stream for (e)CPRI**

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Subcell Type | ST FOE for antenna i | LT FOE for antenna j | (e)CPRI spatial stream | **First feature** |
| A2 or C2 | **puschAntMeas[0].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[0] | (ce)AxC0 | **CB009363-D** |
| **puschAntMeas[1].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[1] | (ce)AxC1 |  |  |
| A4 or C4 | **puschAntMeas[0].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[0] | (ce)AxC0 | **CB009363-D** |
| **puschAntMeas[1].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[1] | (ce)AxC1 |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[2].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[2] | (ce)AxC2 |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[3].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[3] | (ce)AxC3 |  |  |
| C8 | **puschAntMeas[0].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[0] | ceAxC0 | **CB009363-D** |
| **puschAntMeas[1].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[0] | ceAxC1 |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[2].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[1] | ceAxC2 |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[3].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[1] | ceAxC3 |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[4].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[2] | ceAxC4 |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[5].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[2] | ceAxC5 |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[6].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[3] | ceAxC6 |  |  |
| **puschAntMeas[7].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[3] | ceAxC7 |  |  |

Note 1: CPRI FR1 TDD 4Rx beamforming is not supported. Thus antenna-wise ST-FOE and FOC for PUSCH is not designed to support CPRI FR1 TDD 4Rx beamforming. Reason behind is that, in CPRI 4Rx beamforming cells, beam pattern Id mapping to AxC Id is not specified. 5G-L2-PS doesn’t know beam pattern Id’s mapping to AxC stream, and thus can’t perform beam specific FO handling.

Note 2: although antenna-wise ST-FOE and FOC is introduced for FR1 TDD Rx beamforming cells with eCPRI RU, L1's behavior is the same among:

- CPRI or eCPRI FR1 TDD 2RX beamforming

- CPRI or eCPRI FR1 TDD 2RX non beamforming

- CPRI FR1 TDD 4Rx non beamforming

- CPRI FR1 FDD 2RX non beamforming

- CPRI FR1 FDD 4Rx non beamforming

-     For Thor L1 HW eCPRI FR1 TDD 8RX beamforming

5G-L1-UL in **Odin shall estimate antenna-wise ST-FOE and LT-FOE as described above.**

Note 3:

As of CB009363-D, the structure **puschAntMeas in** UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs message is changed to dynamic structure array based on subcell type. Refer to [11513831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).\*\*\*\*

The parameter shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt in the structure **puschAntMeas is no longer array. Refer to [11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).**

The parameter longTermCfoMetricOfAnt in **UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message is changed to longTermCfoMetricOfBeam in MULTI and L1SW in 23R3. Refer to [11513756](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy99_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) and [11396378](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e8r5xPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).**

---

##### 5.4.7.2.2.6 MU Receiver in Odin

**5.4.7.2.2.6.0-1**  (ID: `12732279`)

MU Receiver in Odin
For Thor and MU receiver:

5G-L1-UL shall estimate an antenna-wise ST FOE (see [11401137](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e9BQ7fvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The mapping of each element of the IE shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt to the spatial stream depends on eCPRI configuration as below. The similar mapping shall be considered for the LT estimate received via the IE longTermCfoMetricOfBeam.

For eCPRI case, the order eAxC spatial stream values of the antennas-wise ST-FOE (shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt) in [11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) and LT-FOE (longTermCfoMetricOfBeam) in [11513756](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy99_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) and their mapping to beam patternId shall follow the same mapping order of EcpriConfig struct in [11514653](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR4dkfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

For each UE' antenna-wise ST FOE(CFO estimaiton) on PUSCH, the number of valid measurements is equal to the number of streams (2 or 4) and corresponds to the ceAxC of the UE beam(s).

When C8 subcell is configured and UEs having UL MU-MIMO pairing case, L1 shall support ST CFO and TO measurements, which are computed on UE's own beams. ST CFO and TO on other UE's beams are set to INVALID. Refer to [11104196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kn52SPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

**Mapping between ST FOE/LT FOE and spatial stream for eCPRI (example for 4 rank1 UEs paired in a C8 subcell)**

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Subcell Type (IE ulSubcellType, see [11513449](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRwhwfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | ST FOE for antenna i and UE j  (j=0,1,2,3 per UE pair) , Refer to [11513842](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). | LT FOE for antenna i and UE j  (j=0,1,2,3 per UE pair),  Refer to [11513756](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy99_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). | eCPRI spatial stream | The First Feature |
| C8 | **PuschAntMeas[0].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt for UE 0** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[0] for UE 0 | ceAxC0 carries best beam for UE0 in UE pair | **CB009363-F** |
| **PuschAntMeas[1].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt for UE 0** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[0] for UE 0 | ceAxC1 carries best beam for UE0 in UE pair |  |  |
| **PuschAntMeas[2].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt for UE 1** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[1] for UE 1 | ceAxC2 carries best beam for UE1 in UE pair |  |  |
| **PuschAntMeas[3].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt for UE 1** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[1] for UE 1 | ceAxC3 carries best beam for UE1 in UE pair |  |  |
| **PuschAntMeas[4].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt for UE 2** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[2] for UE 2 | ceAxC4 carries best beam for UE 2 in UE pair |  |  |
| **PuschAntMeas[5].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt for UE 2** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[2] for UE 2 | ceAxC5 carries best beam for UE 2 in UE pair |  |  |
| **PuschAntMeas[6].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt for UE 3** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[3] for UE 3 | ceAxC6 carries best beam for UE3 in UE pair |  |  |
| **PuschAntMeas[7].shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt for UE 3** | longTermCfoMetricOfBeam[3] for UE 3 | ceAxC7 carries best beam for UE3 in UE pair |  |  |

---

#### 5.4.7.2.3 CFO Protection

**5.4.7.2.3.0-2**  (ID: `12732281`)

CFO Protection
To help L2-PS to maintain features 2RX, 4RX, 8RX ; L1 PUSCH shall ensure LT CFO protection for reception of 0+j0 from L2-PS,

* For L2-PS, when using 0+j0 for LT CFO reset, no validity check is performed anymore (i.e., not modify value 0 to 1.0 in purpose).
* For L1SW, assume frequency offset equals 0Hz if LT CFO == 0+j0 is received.

Note: it is also possible that only some antennas (i.e., two of total four) have LT CFO == 0+j0, while other antennas have non-zero values.

See UP ALG [11102750](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knm7UvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

The requirement is common for all the Technologies.

The requirement is supported in Loner, Loki, and Thor. [CB012115-IA] The requirement shall also be supported in Odin. [End CB012115-IA]

---
